products.name: ESC Centurion v2 4-in-1 (3-6S, 65A)
products.descriptor: 4-in-1 drone ESC, 65 A continuous / 80 A peak, 3–6S LiPo, made in France

evidence.snippet:
### **65A continuous, 80A peak: power to match**
The Centurion v2 now boasts **65 amps continuous and up to 80 amps peak**, enough to power the most powerful motors on professional drones, even in heavy configurations (payloads, pods, on-board modules).

### **Wide voltage range (3 to 6S)**
The Centurion v2 runs on **3S to 6S LiPo** batteries, making it versatile for both lightweight drones and more powerful platforms. This allows integrators to modulate their energy architecture without changing the power electronics.

products.notes: 100% made in France per corpus; conformal coating, EMI/EMC filtering, DShot/PWM/Oneshot compatible. No NDAA or Blue UAS claim found.

unresolved_questions: Carte de vol (Flight Controller): The product is referenced in resource-0008 line 20 (linked as the 'flight controller' at https://dronefrancais.fr/en/produit/carte-de-vol/), but that line is a single serialised paragraph of ~69 words — exceeding the 60-word citation limit — and no adjacent shorter line names the product. The product page itself (https://dronefrancais.fr/en/produit/carte-de-vol) was skipped (status: skipped_class_budget). Three news articles about the 'Carte de vol Abell' were also skipped. The product cannot be validly cited from the current corpus, so add_product was not called. The product appears to be named 'Abell' based on URL slugs (carte-de-vol-abell-*).

fetch_requests.reason: Product page for the Carte de vol (flight controller) — needed to classify the product and obtain a citable description; current corpus has only a passing reference on a single long line.
Article announcing the Abell flight controller as a new Made-in-France product — would provide product name, specs and readiness evidence.
Article describing Abell flight controller compatibility with ArduPilot and Betaflight — would confirm firmware/feature details.
Official product page for ESC Centurion v2 — would confirm pricing, stock status and any NDAA/compliance claims not present in the article.
